## Checklist for the Refactoring Project

<!-- If you are done with a topic mark the checkboxes with an `x` (like `[x]`) -->

- [ ] I read and understood the notebook.
- [ ] I made a copy of the notebook for refactoring it.
- [ ] I removed unnecessary code and only kept relevant code for data cleaning and feature engineering.
- [ ] I transformed the steps in the Data Preparation and Feature Engineering sections into functions.
- [ ] Functions are in a separate Python file.

**Optional tasks:**
- [ ] I refactored the modeling step and added it to the pipeline.
- [ ] I built a FastAPI app that allows me to create, read, update and delete houses.
- [ ] I created a `Dockerfile` and a `docker-compose.yaml` file for the app.
- [ ] I built the container with Docker Compose and I am able to run the app inside of it.
- [ ] I created tests for my functions.
